message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

actor " " as User

boundary "ZMDomačaStran" as ZM
control "KrmilnikNovica" as KN
control "KrmilnikPredloga" as KP
control "KrmilnikDogodek" as KD
entity "PredlogProjekta" as PP
entity "Novica" as N
boundary "SVGoogleCalendar\nAPI" as SV

User -> ZM
activate ZM

ZM -> KN
activate KN

KN -> KP
activate KP

KP -> KD
activate KD

KD -> PP
activate PP

PP --> KD
deactivate PP

KD -> N
activate N

N --> KD
deactivate N

KD --> KP
deactivate KD

KP -> SV
activate SV

SV --> KP
deactivate SV

KP --> KN
deactivate KP

KN --> ZM
deactivate KN

ZM --> User
deactivate ZM

@enduml
```
